task.title: Revise main CodeWiki bootstrap skill
task.summary: Update the main `codewiki` skill so it owns bootstrap, status, onboarding, and loop routing without embedding compiler-specific workflow detail.

goal.outcome: Main `codewiki` skill is a lean package-safe entry point for bootstrap/status/router behavior, including sprint-aware routing for related executable work.
acceptance: `skills/codewiki/SKILL.md` describes when to use the main skill for bootstrap, status, onboarding, and selecting the next compiler/gateway mode.
Bootstrap/onboarding guidance is reachable through package-local skill references and does not rely on unpublished `.codewiki/**` links.
Main skill lists available commands/tools accurately enough for first contact, then routes detailed loop work to focused loop skills.
Main skill/router guidance states when related executable work should be tracked through sprint metadata and routes that decision to planning/tool-contract support.
non_goals: Do not author detailed compiler/gateway loop instructions in the main skill.
Do not change runtime bootstrap command behavior unless needed to keep prompt assets loading.
Do not hand-edit roadmap sprint metadata directly from the skill guidance.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context and must cite checked content proof.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence and cite checked content proof.

summary: Implemented TASK-098 main CodeWiki bootstrap/status/router skill contract with lean package-safe main skill guidance, sprint-aware routing criteria, bootstrap onboarding/taxonomy updates, and smoke coverage for package-local skill routing.
checks_run: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck

evidence: Added prompt asset smoke assertions for main skill frontmatter, bootstrap/status ownership, setup/state tools, focused loop routing, sprint routing threshold, manual sprint-edit prohibition, and no package-relative `.codewiki` references.
Added onboarding prompt assertion for sprint metadata guidance.
Added starter taxonomy assertion for sprint metadata boundary.
notes: Targeted prompt/package/restructure tests were run before full smoke, pack, feature, and typecheck suite.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: Rewrote `skills/codewiki/SKILL.md` to be a lean main skill/router instead of a detailed loop spec.
Updated `skills/codewiki/bootstrap/onboarding.md` to mention sprint metadata for related task cohorts and route 3+ related/multi-loop cohorts away from container tasks.
Updated `skills/codewiki/bootstrap/starter-taxonomy.md` with a sprint metadata path class.
Updated README skills overview to describe sprint-aware routing.
notes: No TypeScript runtime behavior changed; edits are skill/bootstrap/README/test contract changes.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: Added prompt asset smoke assertions for main skill frontmatter, bootstrap/status ownership, setup/state tools, focused loop routing, sprint routing threshold, manual sprint-edit prohibition, and no package-relative `.codewiki` references.
Added onboarding prompt assertion for sprint metadata guidance.
Added starter taxonomy assertion for sprint metadata boundary.
code_change_evidence: Rewrote `skills/codewiki/SKILL.md` to be a lean main skill/router instead of a detailed loop spec.
Updated `skills/codewiki/bootstrap/onboarding.md` to mention sprint metadata for related task cohorts and route 3+ related/multi-loop cohorts away from container tasks.
Updated `skills/codewiki/bootstrap/starter-taxonomy.md` with a sprint metadata path class.
Updated README skills overview to describe sprint-aware routing.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: `skills/codewiki/SKILL.md` describes when to use the main skill for bootstrap, status, onboarding, and selecting the next compiler/gateway mode.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Rewrote `skills/codewiki/SKILL.md` as the main entry skill with `When to use`, `First read and bootstrap`, package surface, invariants, compiler routing, and coordination/memory sections.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Bootstrap/onboarding guidance is reachable through package-local skill references and does not rely on unpublished `.codewiki/**` links.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Main skill now points to package-local `bootstrap/onboarding.md`, `bootstrap/starter-taxonomy.md`, loop skills, loop docs, and playbooks; removed previous package-relative `.codewiki` related-doc links and added test coverage forbidding `../.codewiki` style refs.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Main skill lists available commands/tools accurately enough for first contact, then routes detailed loop work to focused loop skills.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Main skill lists public commands and internal `codewiki_*` tools, then routes feedback, documentation, planning, implementation, and validation to dedicated focused skills without embedding loop-level step detail.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Main skill/router guidance states when related executable work should be tracked through sprint metadata and routes that decision to planning/tool-contract support.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Added `Task and sprint routing` section defining 3+ related executable tasks or multi-loop/shared-gate cohorts as sprint-shaped work, forbidding manual sprint metadata edits, and routing safe mutation support to planning/application tool contracts. Updated onboarding and starter taxonomy with sprint metadata guidance.

closure_brief.user_intent: Continue improving CodeWiki skills by revising the main CodeWiki entry skill so it owns bootstrap/status/router behavior, incorporates sprint-aware routing, and sends detailed loop work to focused skills.
implemented_changes: Rewrote main `codewiki` skill as package-safe bootstrap/status/router entrypoint.
Removed reliance on package-relative `.codewiki` related-doc links.
Added sprint-aware routing criteria and no-manual-sprint-edit guidance.
Updated bootstrap onboarding and starter taxonomy with sprint metadata guidance.
Updated README and prompt asset smoke coverage.
acceptance_evidence: Main skill now describes bootstrap/status/onboarding/router usage.
Main skill routes loop-specific work to focused skills and package-local assets.
Main skill lists public commands and internal tools.
Sprint-aware routing criteria are explicit and tested.
checks: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs
npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck
non_goals_preserved: Did not author detailed compiler/gateway loop instructions in the main skill.
Did not change runtime bootstrap command behavior.
Did not hand-edit roadmap sprint metadata.
remaining_risks: Generated CodeWiki graph/task view files changed because roadmap/build state was updated.
Implementation build lacks source_planning_build due accepted feedback-to-task shortcut used before the focused planning loop was validated.
Safe sprint metadata mutation remains TASK-099 work.

risks: No actual sprint metadata was created for TASK-093..TASK-099 because no explicit safe sprint mutation tool exists yet; TASK-099 now owns documenting/providing that safe path.
TASK-093 through TASK-097 remain pending fresh-context validation from staged handoffs.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-098 Revise main CodeWiki bootstrap skill implementation evidence
commit.body:
Implemented TASK-098 main CodeWiki bootstrap/status/router skill contract with lean package-safe main skill guidance, sprint-aware routing criteria, bootstrap onboarding/taxonomy updates, and smoke coverage for package-local skill routing.

Checks: node tests/smoke/prompt-assets.test.mjs && node tests/tasks/TASK-076/restructure.test.mjs && node tests/smoke/package-smoke.test.mjs, npm run test:smoke && npm run test:pack && npm run test:features && npm run typecheck, skill markdown link check script, codewiki_audit profiles alignment,task,generated-parity for TASK-098
Validation: no durable validation refs recorded.
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
